description.p: You were born with a powerful technique that creates a weak spot on a 7:3 ratio.

sheet.description: You were born with a powerful technique that creates a weak spot on a 7:3 ratio

description.p: Beginning at 1st level, you gain a +1 to critical range. Additionally, you roll an additional damage dice on a critical hit (Later upgrades to critical damage are not cummalative, they replace this feature).

sheet.description: You gain a +1 to critical range and roll an additional damage dice on a critical hit.
You gain a +1 to critical range and roll 2 additional damage dice on a critical hit.
You gain a +1 to critical range and roll 3 additional damage dice on a critical hit.
You gain a +1 to critical range and roll 4 additional damage dice on a critical hit.

description.p: Once you reach 3rd level, you have learned your technique that creates weak spots in enemies. Whenever you make an attack roll, you can spend 1 cursed energy to roll a d10. If you roll a 3 or 7 the attack becomes a critical hit.
In addition, you roll 2 additional damage dice on a critical hit.

sheet.description: Whenever you make an attack roll, you can spend 1 CE to roll a d10. If you roll a 3 or 7 the attack becomes a critical hit.
Whenever you make an attack roll, you can spend 1 CE to roll 2d10. You can spend up to {{ce:modifier}} CE to roll additional 1d10 per CE spent. If you roll a 3 or 7 the attack becomes a critical hit.

description.p: When you reach 6th level, as an action for 4 Cursed Energy, you make an attack to destroy the ground around you in a 30 ft circle, applying your critical hit to the rubble. The area becomes difficult terrain and every creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take your attack's damage + 3d10 bludgeoning damage. On a success, they take half as much damage.
If you roll a critical hit, you now deal an extra 3 damage dice.

sheet.description: For 4 CE, make an attack in a 30 ft circle, applying your critical hit to the rubble. The area becomes difficult terrain and every creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take your attack's damage + 3d10 bludgeoning damage. On a success, they take half as much damage.

description.p: At 11th level, you have become more lethal and precise with your Ratio. When you use Ratio, you now roll 2d10 instead of one and you can spend additional CE up to your Cursed Energy modifier to roll an additional d10 per CE spent. You roll 4 additional damage dice on a critical hit.

Finally, at 18th level, you have honed your skill with your technique to a fine edge. In your domain, all of your attacks count as critical hits and you deal an additional 5 damage dice on a critical hit.

sheet.description: All of your attacks count as critical hits and you deal 5 extra damage dice on a critical hit.
